executives.name: Steve Hasker
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Thomson Reuters since March 2020. Previously served as CEO of CAA Global and held senior roles at Nielsen Holdings PLC and McKinsey & Company.

executives.name: Michael Eastwood
executives.background: Chief Financial Officer of Thomson Reuters since March 2020. Previously served as Senior Vice President and Head of Corporate Finance.

executives.name: Thomas Kim
executives.background: Chief Legal Officer and Company Secretary since 2019. Previously served as General Counsel for Global Regions at Baker Hughes.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Company Secretary

executives.name: Mary Alice Vuicic
executives.background: Chief People Officer since 2017. Previously served as Chief Human Resources Officer at L Brands and Shoppers Drug Mart.

executives.name: David Wong
executives.background: Chief Product Officer since 2021. Previously held product leadership roles at Facebook and Microsoft.

board_of_directors.name: David Thomson
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Thomson Reuters and Chairman of Woodbridge. He is a director of several other companies and active in the arts.

board_of_directors.name: Linda Mason
board_of_directors.background: Chair and Founder of Bright Horizons Family Solutions. Former Chair of Mercy Corps.

board_of_directors.name: Kirk Koenigsbauer
board_of_directors.background: Chief Operating Officer and Corporate Vice President of Microsoft's Experiences and Devices Group.

board_of_directors.name: Barry Salzberg
board_of_directors.background: Former Global CEO of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited. Professor at Columbia Business School.

board_of_directors.name: Edmund Clark
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of TD Bank Group. Member of the Order of Canada.

sources.source_description: Thomson Reuters Official Website - Executive Leadership Page
